chatspliter.config.title: ChatSpliter Configuration
chatspliter.filter_group.name: Group Name
chatspliter.tooltip.name: Display name of the filter group
chatspliter.tooltip.keywords: Keywords to match. not/ prefix = exclude, e.g. not/spam. Example: msg,not/11 matches msg but not 11
chatspliter.tooltip.match_mode: Any: match any keyword / All: match all / Regex: regular expression
chatspliter.tooltip.x: Horizontal pixel position of the window
chatspliter.tooltip.y: Vertical pixel position of the window
chatspliter.tooltip.scale: Overall scale of text and background
chatspliter.tooltip.display_time: Total seconds before a message fully disappears
chatspliter.tooltip.max_lines: Maximum message lines kept in memory
chatspliter.tooltip.text_align: Horizontal text alignment within the window
chatspliter.tooltip.scroll_dir: Bottom Up: vanilla. Top Down: newest on top. Top Anchored: auto-shift
chatspliter.tooltip.case_sensitive: When on, both include and exclude rules match letter case
chatspliter.hint.edit_mode: Open chat to drag HUD edges for resize/reposition
